_note: Live schema captured 2026-07-02 from besecurelocksmith.com — source of truth for the Astro port. Review counts to be overridden per client: Gainesville 1330, Ocala 1214, combined 2544.

org_node_homepage.name: Be Secure Locksmith — Ocala
org_node_homepage.description: Be Secure Locksmith has served Ocala, FL and Marion County since 2012 with fast, reliable mobile locksmith services. Our fully insured technicians provide automotive lockouts, key fob programming, transponder key replacement, residential rekeying, commercial lock installation, and master key systems.

itemOffered.name: Automotive Lockout Service
itemOffered.description: Ocala drivers and Marion County residents trust Be Secure Locksmith for fast, damage-free car lockouts. We unlock any make or model on-site anywhere in Marion and Citrus County — no tow truck needed.

priceSpecification.description: Starting price — final price depends on vehicle, lock type, and job complexity

itemOffered.name: Car Key Programming
itemOffered.description: Transponder keys and smart keys programmed on-site for Ocala drivers throughout Marion County. We come to your home, workplace, or wherever you are stranded — no dealership visit required.

priceSpecification.description: Starting price — final price depends on vehicle, lock type, and job complexity

itemOffered.name: Car Key Replacement
itemOffered.description: Lost or broken car keys replaced on-site anywhere in Ocala and Marion County. We cut and program most domestic and foreign vehicle keys.

priceSpecification.description: Starting price — final price depends on vehicle, lock type, and job complexity

itemOffered.name: Key Fob Programming
itemOffered.description: Key fobs programmed on-site for push-to-start and remote entry vehicles throughout Ocala and Marion County. New fob supplied and paired to your vehicle without a tow.

itemOffered.name: Ignition Repair
itemOffered.description: Stuck key, worn ignition cylinder, or faulty switch diagnosed and repaired at your Ocala location. Most vehicles serviced on-site without a tow.

itemOffered.name: Broken Key Extraction
itemOffered.description: Broken key stuck in your Ocala home, business, or vehicle lock? We remove it safely without damaging the hardware — available throughout Ocala, Marion County, and surrounding communities.

priceSpecification.description: Starting price — final price depends on vehicle, lock type, and job complexity

itemOffered.name: Emergency Lockout Service
itemOffered.description: Immediate dispatch for home, vehicle, and business lockouts throughout Ocala and Marion County. Available Monday through Saturday, 8am to 7pm.

itemOffered.name: Home Lockout Service
itemOffered.description: Locked out of your Ocala home in Marion Oaks, Belleview, or anywhere in Marion County? Be Secure Locksmith provides fast, damage-free residential entry throughout the region.

priceSpecification.description: Starting price — final price depends on vehicle, lock type, and job complexity

itemOffered.name: Lock Rekeying
itemOffered.description: Ocala homeowners, landlords, and property managers rely on Be Secure Locksmith for fast, affordable rekeying after move-ins, tenant turnover, or lost keys. All major brands serviced on-site.

priceSpecification.description: Starting price — final price depends on vehicle, lock type, and job complexity

itemOffered.name: New Lock Installation
itemOffered.description: Deadbolts, handle sets, and entry locks installed on any door for Ocala homeowners and businesses. We carry Schlage, Kwikset, and other leading brands.

itemOffered.name: Lock Repair
itemOffered.description: Worn, damaged, or misaligned locks repaired on-site throughout Ocala and Marion County. We service all major residential and commercial lock brands.

itemOffered.name: Lock Change
itemOffered.description: Full lock replacement for Ocala homes and businesses where rekeying is not sufficient. We install residential and commercial-grade locks on all door types.

itemOffered.name: Deadbolt Installation
itemOffered.description: ANSI Grade 1 and Grade 2 deadbolts installed for Ocala homeowners and businesses. We carry Schlage, Kwikset, and other trusted brands in a range of finishes.

priceSpecification.description: Starting price — final price depends on vehicle, lock type, and job complexity

itemOffered.name: Smart Lock Installation
itemOffered.description: Smart locks from Schlage, Kwikset, and Yale installed and configured for Ocala homes and businesses. Keyless entry with app integration and remote access.

itemOffered.name: Keypad Lock Installation
itemOffered.description: Standalone battery-operated keypad locks installed for Ocala homes and businesses. No subscription or network required — simple, reliable keyless entry.

priceSpecification.description: Starting price — final price depends on vehicle, lock type, and job complexity

itemOffered.name: Mailbox Lock Replacement
itemOffered.description: Mailbox locks replaced quickly and affordably for Ocala homeowners and property managers. We carry common lock sizes and install on-site.

priceSpecification.description: Starting price — final price depends on vehicle, lock type, and job complexity

itemOffered.name: Key Duplication
itemOffered.description: Spare keys cut on-site for Ocala homes, businesses, and vehicles. We duplicate residential, commercial, and high-security keys at your location.

itemOffered.name: Commercial Locksmith Services
itemOffered.description: Be Secure Locksmith serves Ocala offices, retail stores, restaurants, warehouses, and apartment complexes with commercial lock installation, rekeying, and lockout response.

itemOffered.name: Commercial Lockout Service
itemOffered.description: Locked out of your Ocala business? We dispatch immediately and arrive equipped for commercial-grade locks with minimal disruption to your operations.

priceSpecification.description: Starting price — final price depends on vehicle, lock type, and job complexity

itemOffered.name: Master Key Systems
itemOffered.description: Master key systems designed and installed for Ocala businesses and multi-unit properties. One key for management, individual keys for staff.

itemOffered.name: Interchangeable Core Locks
itemOffered.description: Interchangeable core systems installed for Ocala commercial properties needing frequent access changes. Cores swap in seconds without removing the lock.

itemOffered.name: Property Management Locksmith Services
itemOffered.description: Be Secure Locksmith partners with Ocala property managers and HOAs across Marion County for rekeying, lock changes, and lockout response. Fast turnaround across multi-unit properties, retirement communities, and commercial buildings.

itemOffered.name: Panic Bar Installation
itemOffered.description: Code-compliant panic bar and exit device installation for commercial doors throughout Ocala. We service all major brands and ensure Florida life safety compliance.

itemOffered.name: Panic Bar Repair
itemOffered.description: Malfunctioning panic bars diagnosed and repaired on-site for Ocala commercial buildings. We service all major exit device brands.

itemOffered.name: Door Closer Installation
itemOffered.description: Commercial door closers installed and adjusted for Ocala offices, retail stores, and institutional buildings. ADA-compliant closing force configured per door.

itemOffered.name: Security Assessment
itemOffered.description: Complimentary security assessment included with every Be Secure Locksmith visit in Ocala. Honest vulnerability findings with no obligation or upsell pressure.

review.reviewBody: Dillon was a great technician which explained everything to us before even getting started to make sure it was acceptable. I would not only recommend this company, we will also use again for future jobs. Thank u

Dillon was a respectful and courteous technician, and he was able to rekey my door lock without additional new parts or costs. I appreciate his willingness and ability to complete the task without adding extra charges.
Very professional and kind. I would definitely recommend and use them again!

review.reviewBody: Service was awesome and affordable. The technician arrived on time and unlocked the door in less than 5 minutes.

Amazing quick professional service. From the receptionist who scheduled the same day service to our locksmith Netta who was courteous, extraordinarily competent and efficient. This is the BEST locksmith company available!

Locksmith was able to come same-day (within the hour!) to help reconfigure antique door locking mechanism to allow for key access. Amazing help for an elderly family member to assist with a big safety concern. Thank you so much to the amazing tech who responded, Netta, for your speedy, courteous, and professional help in our family members home. Worth every penny for peace of mind.
